creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Does not build: http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/darktable-0.4.log, 
also please run portlint -AN on it (ports-mgmt/portlint) and fix 
reported errors. Also, MASTER_SITES may be shortened to just SF and 
LIB_DEPENDS should be placed higher, after COMMENT.
